## Summary
- Add central `runEvaluationBackwardRelook` engine using canonical SLAE grounding statuses from PR #1001.
- Add status-aware report persistence guard that refuses report persistence unless Backward Relook allows it.
- Add contamination matrix coverage for structural failure, boundary failure, fallback path use, unresolved evidence mismatch, uncertified long-form scoring, partial long-form scoring, explicit blocked grounding, reportable uncertainty, and reason-code dedupe.

## Scope
- `lib/evaluation/backwardRelook.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/statusAwareReportPersistence.ts`
- `__tests__/lib/evaluation/backwardRelook.test.ts`

## Process / Doctrine
- Reuses canonical SLAE statuses rather than creating a second status vocabulary.
- Preserves fail-closed behavior: blocked grounding maps to failed/invalid and report persistence is denied.
- Does not add runtime loops or model calls.

## Validation
- Not run in this environment. GitHub connector writes only; no working repo checkout or npm execution available here.

## Follow-up note
This PR lands the shared engine and enforceable matrix. The next patch should wire `runEvaluationBackwardRelook` directly into `persistEvaluationResultV2` success-path completion payloads so atomic `evaluation_result_v2` persistence receives the same grounding metadata.
